channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NBA trade involves Dort's transfer to Hawks and Risacher's move to Mavs

item.description: Sen. Solomon Adeola, APC's gubernatorial candidate in Ogun, accused opposition politicians of prioritizing personal wealth over public service. In a statement released in Abeokuta, his media adviser K...

item.title: Slovenian Referee Slavko Vincic to Officiate Spain vs Argentina World Cup Final
item.description: Slavko Vincic, a Slovenian referee, will officiate the 2022 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina on Sunday, making him the first Slovenian to referee a World Cup final. The 46-year-old, kn...

item.title: Three U.S. Soldiers Killed in Iran Strikes; Trump Comments on Troop Deaths
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been confirmed killed in escalating strikes between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend, according to reports. Two soldiers died on Friday defending against an Iranian b...

item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene sharply criticized Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth after he referred to two U.S. service members killed in an Iranian strike in Jordan as having made a 'sacrifice.' The disp...

item.title: Quezon City Government Provides Support to Slain Rider’s Family
item.description: The Quezon City government has stepped in to assist the family of Fabio Norberte Jr., a motorcycle taxi rider who was stabbed to death by his passenger on July 14, 2026, in Caloocan. Officials express...

item.title: Blood test could predict Alzheimer’s risk years before symptoms, study suggests
item.description: A groundbreaking blood test that detects a protein linked to Alzheimer’s could identify the disease up to a decade before symptoms appear, according to a study presented at the Alzheimer’s Association...

item.title: Winnipeg man charged with extortion after keeping missing cat
item.description: A 44-year-old woman in Winnipeg reported her cat missing from her home on July 14, 2026. Police investigations revealed a neighbor suspected of involvement, who later admitted to possessing the cat an...

item.title: Pedestrian Fatally Struck by Vehicle in Mississauga, Ontario

item.title: Trump attends World Cup final as U.S. president watches Argentina and Spain clash

item.title: Strangers Save 7-Year-Old Wyoming Girl's Birthday Party After All Invitations Were Canceled

item.title: Mantrac and NMB Facilitate Equipment Financing for Miners and Contractors
